Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on cardiovascular issues, chronic kidney disease, and other unrelated conditions. While the patient is on medications that may be used in the management of cardiovascular diseases, there is no mention of any lipid abnormalities or ongoing management of a lipid disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not possible to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
